audio_identity.overall_style: Noted as not as strong as other NES games like Super Mario Bros. 3; typical of Adventure Island series audio

note: Available sources do not contain specific music documentation including tempo, keys, chord progressions, or detailed SFX characteristics. Wikipedia identifies composers Miyoshi Okuyama and Hirohiko Takayama. GamePro review mentions music quality comparatively but provides no technical specifications. No per-area audio data is documented in provided sources.
